_doc: Narration script for the workflow video. Explanatory voiceover — describes what each panel does, no marketing-style imperatives. Adam Denney (user's own cloned voice).

scenes.title: Intro
scenes.text: Here's a quick tour of ProCabinet.App. I'll walk you through setting your rates and designing a cabinet from scratch.

scenes.title: My Rates
scenes.text: The rates panel holds your labour rate, markup, tax, and standard cabinet prices. Every quote reads from here.

scenes.title: Cabinet Builder
scenes.text: In the Cabinet Builder, you spec each cabinet's dimensions, doors, drawers, and hardware. All priced from your rates.

scenes.title: Specifying a cabinet
scenes.text: Each field updates the live price as you fill it in. Width, height, door count, carcass material, hardware.

scenes.title: Cabinet Library
scenes.text: Saving a cabinet to your library makes it reusable. Drop it into any future quote in one click.
